_comment: Single source of truth for all candidate domain words and their shelf categories. Every word is assigned exactly one category. To add or move words, edit this file and redeploy — no other word list exists.

nature.title: Nature & Earth
nature.description: Organic, natural words — wellness, eco, lifestyle brands

tech.title: Tech & Systems
tech.description: Speed, precision, systems — SaaS, devtools, startups

food.title: Food & Taste
food.description: Flavor-forward names — restaurants, food tech, lifestyle

motion.title: Motion & Flow
motion.description: Speed, action, momentum — sports, fintech, bold brands

craft.title: Craft & Build
craft.description: Make, shape, forge — studios, makers, artisan brands

people.title: People & Society
people.description: Human roles, community, and social concepts

place.title: Place & Space
place.description: Locations, structures, geography — real estate, travel, local brands

mind.title: Mind & Ideas
mind.description: Thinking, feeling, abstract concepts — philosophy, wellness, education

body.title: Body & Health
body.description: Anatomy, wellness, fitness — health tech, sports, medical brands

others.title: Others
others.description: General words — versatile, cross-industry brand names
